title: Test Quest
description: A quest which includes all objective types, to test their functionality.

objective_002.completionMessage: testName2 should have been carying an item which may show the way forward. Look around to find it, and take that item.

objective_003.completionMessage: Now that you have the puzzle box, solve it to progress.

objective_004.completionMessage: You've solved the puzzle box, and Gilear will be expecting it. Hide from him.

objective_005.completionMessage: Good job hiding from Gilear.  To complete the quest, move to room 1

objective_006.completionMessage: Good job hiding from Gilear.  To complete the quest, move to room 1

rewards.name: Light Leather Armor
rewards.description: Flexible leather armor designed for ease of movement while offering modest protection.

completionMessage: You have completed the test quest.  Good job.
